title: helenium chihuahuensis
intro: Helenium chihuahuensis, also known as Mexican Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helenium chihuahuensis include reducing inflammation, relieving headaches, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
